intended_use: An electrocardiograph software device for over-the-counter use creates, analyzes, and displays electrocardiograph data, and can provide information for identifying cardiac arrhythmias. This device is
intended_use_full: An electrocardiograph software device for over-the-counter use creates, analyzes, and displays electrocardiograph data, and can provide information for identifying cardiac arrhythmias. This device is not intended to provide a diagnosis.
target_condition: atrial fibrillation and cardiac arrhythmia detection
ground_truth: rhythm classification of a 12-lead ECG by a cardiologist
other_metrics: PQRST waveform morphology agreement: P-waves 95.3%, QRS complexes 100%, T-waves 100%; polarity agreement: P-waves 100%, T-waves 99.6%; subgroup sensitivity ranged 99.0%-100% across age groups; subgroup specificity ranged 98.2%-100%; female sensitivity 100%, specificity 99.6%; male sensitivity 99.5%, specificity 100%
